text.title: Code Coverage Setup Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from a repo with no coverage gate to a CI-enforced branch + diff-coverage configuration.

step.name: detect-stack
step.action: Run a fingerprint check: presence of `pyproject.toml` → python; `package.json` with jest or vitest → js/ts; `go.mod` → go; `Cargo.toml` → rust. Mixed if more than one is found.
step.output: stack value: one of {python, js, ts, go, rust, mixed}

step.name: write-config
step.input: stack value + critical-path manifest (list of dirs)
step.action: Copy the matching template (`templates/coverage.pyproject.toml` or `templates/jest.coverage.config.js`); fill global_threshold=80, diff_threshold=90, populate per_dir from critical-path manifest with 90+.
step.output: committed coverage config file in repo
step.decision-gate: If repo is legacy with current coverage <60%, drop global_threshold to current value and rely on diff_threshold only — do not block PRs on legacy gaps.

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Add a step to the CI workflow: run tests with coverage, publish lcov.info / coverage.xml as artefact, run diff-cover against `main`, fail the job if diff coverage < diff_threshold.
step.output: PR runs show coverage check status

step.name: extract-uncovered
step.input: coverage.xml or lcov.info from latest CI run
step.action: Run `scripts/extract-uncovered.sh` (or `templates/diff-cov-report.sh`) to produce a small JSON of uncovered lines per touched file.
step.output: uncovered-lines extract, conforming to the schema in 02-output-contract.xml

step.name: hand-off-to-test-author
step.action: Pass extract + source to the test-author subagent (sonnet). Agent writes targeted tests, asserting behaviour. Re-run CI. If diff coverage still below threshold, repeat or escalate.
step.output: new tests committed, coverage gate green
step.decision-gate: If after 2 iterations the gate is still red and no new test is feasible (e.g. dead code), escalate to human review — do not let the agent silence the gate.
